# Dr. Puja's Clinic Website (WebSiteV2)

Information and context regarding the official website for Dr. Puja's Clinic, a premium Gynaecology & Fertility Centre located in Patparganj, East Delhi.

## Technical Stack
- **Frontend:** Clean semantic HTML5, custom CSS (including utility-based layouts and responsive styling), vanilla JavaScript.
- **Integrations:** EmailJS (client-side form handling), Google Tag Manager / Analytics, WhatsApp Click-to-Chat.
- **SEO & Discoverability:** Highly optimized JSON-LD Structured Data Schema (`MedicalClinic`, `Physician`), semantic landmarks (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`), canonical headers, and performance preloads.

## Core Pages & Architecture
The website uses a single-page application architectural flow controlled via JavaScript (`showPage()`), handling multiple distinct views seamlessly within a single `<main>` container:

- **Home (`#home`):** Hero section featuring an interactive appointment booking trigger, verified trust signals (Practo Prime validation, 23+ years experience badge), and a comprehensive services grid.
- **About (`#about`):** Detailed professional bio, educational background (MBBS, MS, DMAS, FMAS), and key practice philosophy.
- **Services (`#services`):** Comprehensive breakdown of medical specialties including Obstetrics, Infertility, PCOD Management, and Laparoscopic (Minimal Access) Surgery.
- **Facilities (`#facilities`):** Overview of clinical infrastructure, medical diagnostic equipment, and patient comfort standards.
- **Locations (`#locations`):** Schedule matrix mapping hours across multiple physical OPD sites (Madhu Vihar, Pushpanjali Hospital, Max Super Speciality, Femmenest).
- **Blog (`#blog`):** Educative patient guides, health articles, and medical advice summaries.
- **Contact (`#contact`):** Lead capture forms managed via EmailJS, operational maps, and direct emergency routing info.

## Critical Business Rules & Configuration Data
- **Domain:** `https://drpujaprasad.in/`
- **Primary Contact Number:** `+91-9899416040`
- **Primary Email:** `drpujasclinic@gmail.com`
- **Consultation Fees:** Transparent fee structures starting at ₹800–₹1000.
- **Booking Rules:** Active appointment options must bridge both internal form logic and the external scheduler layout.

## Key Files
- `/index.html` - Primary layout, single-page DOM containers, global configuration metadata, and JSON-LD markup.
- `/css/style.css` - Core design system, typography matrices, color variables (`#12282D`), and adaptive media queries.
- `/css/booking-widget.css` - UI layout structures explicitly formatting the interactive appointment booking modals.
- `/js/` - Logic handlers orchestrating SPA navigation, EmailJS transaction requests, and state management.
